headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 10, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays handed the Los Angeles Angels one of the most lopsided defeats in recent history, winning 14-1. Brandon Valenzuela led the Angels' offense with 4 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. In other action, the Oakland Athletics secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, led by Brent Rooker's impressive performance at the plate. Aaron Civale earned the win with 5 strong innings, striking out 6 batters and allowing 0 earned runs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Justin Verlander, who has been transferred to the 60-day injured list by the Detroit Tigers due to left hip inflammation. Kerry Carpenter has also been placed on the 10-day injured list by the Tigers with a left AC Joint Sprain. The Los Angeles Dodgers have transferred Edwin Díaz to the 60-day injured list due to right elbow loose bodies.

The San Francisco Giants traded catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for left-hander Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired right-handers Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash. The Athletics traded right-hander Tyler Ferguson to the Chicago Cubs.

top_news.title: **Angels Suffer Historic Loss to Blue Jays**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Los Angeles Angels 14-1, handing them one of the most lopsided defeats in recent history. Brandon Valenzuela led the Angels' offense with 4 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Athletics Take Down Orioles 6-2**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, led by Brent Rooker's impressive performance at the plate. Aaron Civale earned the win with 5 strong innings, striking out 6 batters and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Reds in Cincinnati**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros suffered a 1-3 loss to the Cincinnati Reds, with Braden Shewmake leading the Astros' offense with a home run and an RBI. Spencer Arrighetti pitched 5.2 innings for the Astros, striking out five and allowing one earned run.

top_news.title: **Nationals Fall Short in Miami**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dropped a 7-8 decision to the Miami Marlins, unable to overcome a late comeback. Kyle Stowers led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Nationals Fall to Marlins in 5-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals suffered a 5-2 defeat at the hands of the Miami Marlins, with Luis García Jr. and Daylen Lile contributing to the Nationals' offense. Heriberto Hernández also had a notable performance for the losing team.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Athletics 2-1**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a narrow 2-1 victory over the Athletics, with Gunnar Henderson and Dylan Beavers emerging as key contributors in the win.

top_news.title: **Verlander Shifts to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Justin Verlander has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to left hip inflammation. The Detroit Tigers pitcher will be sidelined for an extended period.

top_news.title: Giants Make Pre-Season Trade
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants traded catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. This move is one of the first major trades of the 2026 season.
